refnamediv.refpurpose: Makes a geometry from WKB with the given SRID

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: The ST_PointFromWKB function, takes a well-known binary representation of geometry and a Spatial Reference System ID (SRID) and creates an instance of the appropriate geometry type - in this case, a POINT geometry. This function plays the role of the Geometry Factory in SQL.
If an SRID is not specified, it defaults to 0. NULL is returned if the input bytea does not represent a POINT geometry.

refsection.title: Examples
